1839010.name: Chomp Hero
1839010.description:
Chomp Hero offers a strategic mix between a dungeon crawler and a puzzle, where enemies move at the same time you do, each with their own unique behaviors and move patterns. Whenever two entities collide, whether it is you and an enemy, or two enemies, the higher level will "chomp" up the lower level, consuming them and leveling up.

Your goal is to complete each dungeon's objectives, such as reaching a specific level, rescuing villagers or completing quests as you try navigating the dungeon and plan your route ahead as one careless move could be your last one, putting you in a deadlock position with no way out. But don't worry, while challenging to figure out, the levels are short and restarting is easy, allowing you to quickly get back to where you were within a minute and try out a different tactic!

  • Special monsters with unique behaviors. Try to corner a ghost that can move through walls, or outrun the hobgoblin, who moves faster than you.

  • Powerful bosses. Try and outmaneuver them to win while avoiding their attacks.

  • Hand-crafted levels. Thoughtfully crafted levels to provide you with a puzzling challenge as you try to survive the next move.

  • Cute pixel graphics mixed with modern visual effects. We are mixing old-school pixel graphics with the latest powerful shaders creating an immersive world.
